psychologicalTriggerMatrix.description: Advanced psychological principles matched to specific customer segments and industries

triggerMechanics.coreScience: Scarcity (FOMO) + Social Proof (herd behavior) = 3x conversion lift

implementation.level2: Add social proof: 'Sarah, John, and 47 others signed up today'
implementation.level3: Combine with urgency: 'New cohort starts Friday - closing in 24 hours'

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: We accept 100 founders per month. 87 have applied this month. [Apply Now] - closes Friday midnight

triggerMechanics.coreScience: Authority (trust transfer) + Specific data (not generic) = credibility multiplier

implementation.level2: Make specific: '500+ including Uber, Stripe, and Airbnb'
implementation.level3: Add metric: 'Customers see average 40% productivity increase'
implementation.level4: Include third-party validation: 'G2 rated #1 in category'

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: Trusted by 500+ companies including Uber and Stripe. 91% report ≥30% ROI in first 90 days. G2 #1 Leader.

triggerMechanics.coreScience: Vivid problem visualization + quick solution = high conversion

implementation.level1: Vivid problem: 'Your team spends 8+ hours weekly on repetitive tasks'
implementation.level3: Add cost: 'At $50/hour, that's $20,800 in lost productivity'
implementation.level4: Immediate relief: 'Our software eliminates 80% of this in 24 hours'

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: Your team wastes 416 hours/year on manual data entry ($20,800 lost). Eliminate 80% in 24 hours with [Product]. Try free →

triggerMechanics.coreScience: Give valuable thing first (no strings) = obligation to reciprocate

implementation.level1: Free resource: 'Download free Growth Framework template'
implementation.level3: Low friction: 'Instant download, no email required'
implementation.level4: Subtle CTA: 'When you're ready to implement, we can help →'

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: Get our $997 Growth Playbook free. Used by 300+ founders. [Download Now]

triggerMechanics.coreScience: Multiple types of social proof + specific outcomes = 2-5x credibility

implementation.level4: Specific results: 'Customers report 3x productivity in 30 days'
implementation.level5: Raw testimonials: 'This saved us $150k in 6 months' - CFO, Company X

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: [Video of actual customer]: 'In 90 days, our costs dropped from $50k to $15k/month. This tool paid for itself 10x over.' - Jane, CFO at TechCo

triggerMechanics.coreScience: Self-perception mechanism - people buy to become who they want to be

implementation.level2: Show aspiration: 'Who are scaling from $0-1M MRR'
implementation.level4: Show peer group: 'Network with top 1% founders'

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: Join 2,000 founders scaling from $100k to $10M ARR. Monthly mastermind calls. Private Slack community. [Apply Now]

triggerMechanics.coreScience: People feel loss 2x stronger than equivalent gain

implementation.level1: Frame the alternative: 'Without this, you'll continue spending $X/month'
implementation.level2: Show cumulative loss: 'That's $120,000/year of preventable waste'
implementation.level3: Add regret: 'Your competitors already switched 6 months ago'
implementation.level4: Offer guarantee: '100% money-back if not satisfied'

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: Keep paying $15k/month to your current vendor? Switch in 24 hours. Or get 100% money back. No risk. [Try Now]

triggerMechanics.coreScience: Small commitment → consistency principle → larger commitment

implementation.level3: Natural escalation: 'See how to fix it' → Book call

triggerMechanics.exampleCopy: [Interactive quiz]: 'Answer 5 questions to get your Waste Score' → [Results page with CTA to book call]

B2B_SaaS.exampleFramework: Authority (G2 #1) + Specific Results (3x productivity) + Exclusivity (2% adoption rate) + No Risk (30-day guarantee)

E-Commerce.messagingAngle: Scarcity, Free Value, Proof, Loss Aversion
E-Commerce.exampleFramework: Limited stock + Free shipping offer + Customer reviews (4.8★) + Only 3 left message

Premium_Courses.exampleFramework: Paint the struggle + Show results (testimonials, case studies) + Join elite community + Start with assessment

Consulting.messagingAngle: Authority, Pain amplification, Free value, Proof
Consulting.exampleFramework: Credentials + Problem vivification + Free audit/assessment + Client results

copyTesting.description: Which trigger combos win in A/B tests

historicalWinners.example: ["40% more productive"] + ["G2 #1"] + ["Only for top 5% of customers"]
